name: Plenty Mouthpiece Set
summary: Plenty Mouthpiece Set — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Plenty Mouthpiece Set includes four additional mouthpieces for the Plenty vaporiser, making it a practical option for those who want to refresh their vape or have spare mouthpieces on hand for sharing with friends. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
